name: infamous-freight
description: Infamous Freight — The freight dispatch platform built by truckers, for truckers

scripts.dev:api: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && npm --prefix apps/api run start:dev
scripts.build:api: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && npm --prefix apps/api run build
scripts.build:all:apps: npm run build:api && npm run build:mobile
scripts.verify:all: npm run prisma:generate && npm run lint && npm run build:all:apps && npm run test
scripts.setup:env: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const isWin = process.platform === 'win32'; const candidates = isWin ? [['bash', ['scripts/bootstrap-environment.sh']]] : [['bash', ['scripts/bootstrap-environment.sh']], ['sh', ['scripts/bootstrap-environment.sh']]]; let lastError = null; for (const [command, args] of candidates) { const result = spawnSync(command, args, { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (!result.error) { process.exit(result.status ?? 0); } lastError = result.error; } if (isWin) { console.error('setup:env requires a POSIX shell to run scripts/bootstrap-environment.sh. On Windows, please run this command from Git Bash or WSL.'); } else { console.error('setup:env could not find a compatible shell (tried: bash, sh).'); } if (lastError) { console.error(lastError.message); } process.exit(1);"
scripts.start: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && npm --prefix apps/api run start:prod
scripts.lint: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && npm --prefix apps/api run lint && npm --prefix apps/web run lint
scripts.test: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && npm --prefix apps/api run test -- --runInBand
scripts.prisma:generate: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && cd apps/api && npm exec prisma generate
scripts.prisma:migrate: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && cd apps/api && npm exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:seed: node scripts/ensure-api-workspace.js && cd apps/api && npm exec prisma db seed
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
